subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-21 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: How excellent is the memorial left behind, mentioned in all the divine worlds, even unto the realm of Láhút. Consider ye how Moses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چه خوب یادگاری گذاشته و در جمیع عوالم الهی مذکور است حتی در عالم لاهوت.  ملاحظه کنید که حضرت موسی
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @religion as basis of morality; of divine civilization, @suffering; rejection of Christ
